text.text:
*REPORT APP — WEEKLY PULSE*
Week of May 4–10, 2026

*Usage* — report opens as a % of hosting sessions in the week. Δ = WoW change.

* Top: Presentation Report 95% (+4%), Sessions Report 33% (flat), Presentation Report > Participant Report 13% (-7%; quietly fading from ~25% in Feb)
* Risers WoW: All Participant Responses 3.3% (+94%), All Participants 4.6% (+50%), Shared Presentation Report 2.8% (+24%), All Slides Report 3.5% (+13%)
* 💀 Long-term fader: Presentation Report > Feedback Tab stuck at 0.2%, down from ~5% before April.

*CSAT* (all-time, n ≥ 10 votes)

* Top: Presentation Report > Slides 90%, Presentation Report > Feedback Section 86%, Presentation Report > Participant List 83%
* Bottom: Reports > Sessions 62%, Presentation Report > Participant Report 71%
* Trending down: Presentation Report > Participant List — 92% → 83% → 84% → 77% (Jan–Apr). Export and visibility complaints accumulating.
* Trending up: Presentation Report > Participant Report 63% → 73% → 77% (Feb–Apr).
* Verbatim on Presentation Report > Overview Section (translated from Russian): "There were 3 votes, but it only shows 1."
* Feedback themes — Overview Section: vote-count accuracy, % displays, interactive Excel export. Participant List: Excel/CSV export, response visibility, real-time updates.

⚠️ ~65% of Reports CSAT events have a missing `feature_name` tag and don't appear in per-panel dashboards. Worth fixing.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards/#id=10923568|Usage dashboard> · <https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards/#id=10925935|CSAT dashboard>
